name: Ceviche Acapulco
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Red snapper fillets; cut into 1/2 inch pieces
8 oz Small peeled and deveined shrimp
3/4 cup Pimento-stuffed green olives; finely chopped
2 tbsp Jalapeno pepper strips, finely chopped with juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Place seafood in a glass bowl.
2. Cover with lime juice.
3. Marinate for 4 hours or overnight.
4. Drain the seafood and return it to the bowl.
5. Mix onion, serrano peppers, tomatoes, olives, parsley, and cilantro.
6. Stir in tomato juice, olive oil, jalapeno pepper strips with juice, Worcestershire sauce, oregano, and salt.
7. Pour the marinade over the fish and mix gently.
8. Refrigerate for 1 day to allow flavors to develop.
9. Serve ceviche in cups, garnishing with chopped cilantro.
10. Ceviche can be refrigerated for up to 5 days.
